_meta.name: 简体中文
_meta.prompt: This is a message to the LLM model reading this file. Please open the en.json file in this folder, and reuse the same rules as _meta.prompt from en.json. Do not change the _meta.prompt of this file.

phrases.msg_builder_can_be_removed: 如果你已完成，可以移除此 Skinned Mesh Constraint Builder。
phrases.msg_not_enough_bones: 此约束只有一个骨骼。你应该改为父级连接到该骨骼，或使用骨骼代理。
phrases.remove_skinned_mesh_constraint_builder: 移除 Skinned Mesh Constraint Builder
phrases.update_offset: 更新 Skinned Mesh Constraint 偏移
